calendar_step1_desc: This is where consistency meets reward. Complete your daily goals to earn badges.
calendar_step2: This is your battle map. Green days are victories, red days are opportunities for improvement.
calendar_step3: Click on a day to see the details. Here you'll see what you need to do (or what you've achieved) on that day.
badges_step1_desc: Here you can view your evolution in the Leagues and the Badges you have already earned.
badges_step2: The system is divided into Levels (or Leagues). You need to complete challenges to unlock the next level.
badges_step3: Each icon is a badge. The colored ones are yours! The gray ones... well, you still have to earn them!
